title: Social phase blocks pipeline indefinitely when Slack approval has no timeout
description: The social phase regularly blocks the entire pipeline for hours (up to 37 hours on 03/23, 23 hours on 03/30) because gate_timeout_seconds is null in social-config.json and ApprovalGateway._slack_poll_replies() polls forever when timeout_seconds is None. The current 04/01 pipeline run has social phase stuck in 'running' status right now. Additionally, _web_approval() has an infinite while-True loop with no timeout guard. Evidence from traces.db phase_tracking: social phase durations of 135993s, 84334s, 63516s, 34746s, 31510s, 26256s, 24543s, 22165s, 16560s in the last 14 days.
requirements: Add a default maximum timeout (e.g. 4 hours) to _slack_poll_replies() even when gate_timeout_seconds is None
Add a timeout guard to _web_approval() infinite polling loop
When timeout is reached, auto-skip (return skip action) rather than hanging forever
Log a warning when timeout is reached so it shows in traces
Ensure the phase_tracking record gets completed_at set even on timeout
done_criteria: Social phase never runs longer than the configured max timeout
_slack_poll_replies returns None after max timeout regardless of gate_timeout_seconds config
Pipeline continues to next phase after approval timeout
context: Traces data shows 04/01 run social phase stuck in running, 03/23 ran 135993s (37.7 hours), 03/30 ran 84334s (23.4 hours). Root cause: social-config.json has gate_timeout_seconds: null, and _slack_poll_replies has 'while True' with no upper bound when timeout_seconds is None.
